config.description: Path to the workflow config file under test (mutually exclusive with yaml)

yaml.description: Inline workflow YAML config string (mutually exclusive with config)

mocks.description: Global mock overrides applied to all tests (per-test mocks override these)

steps.description: Map of step type (e.g. step.db_query) to mocked output fields

additionalProperties.description: Mocked output map for this step type

tests.description: Map of test name to test case definition

description.description: Human-readable label shown in test output

stop_after.description: Halt pipeline execution after this named step completes

mocks.description: Per-test mock overrides (same structure as global mocks)

assertions.description: Ordered list of checks applied to the result (used with trigger, ignored when sequence is set)

sequence.description: Multi-step stateful test sequence (replaces single trigger)

triggerDef.description: How to invoke the system under test

name.description: Pipeline name (used when type is pipeline)

data.description: Trigger input data (pipeline trigger data or HTTP body)

method.description: HTTP method (used when type is http)

path.description: HTTP path (used when type is http)

assertion.description: One check applied to the test result

step.description: Scope this assertion to a specific step's output (if empty, applies to overall pipeline output)

output.description: Assert that all key/value pairs appear in the output

executed.description: Assert whether the named step ran (true) or was skipped (false)

state.description: Assert per-store key/value pairs in the StateStore (store_name -> key -> expected_value)

status.description: Expected HTTP status code (0 means do not check)

body.description: Substring expected in the response body

stateConfig.description: State to set up before a test case runs

fixtures.description: Files to load into named stores

file.description: Path to the fixture file (JSON or YAML)

seed.description: Inline initial state: store_name -> key -> value

sequenceStep.description: One step in a multi-step stateful test

pipeline.description: Shorthand pipeline name (used if trigger.name is empty)

assertions.description: Assertions checked after this step executes
